capabilities.notes: Log contains session_start (host=REAPER format=VST3), define_parameters, and prepare events.
Log contains define_parameters and serialize_plugin_state events.
Log contains 8 bus_layout_proposal events (2 in / 1 out arrangements, including an unsupported layout accepted via the silence accommodation).

quirks.notes: Log contains repeated process_without_prepare events (83) after REAPER released the initial prepare state.
Log contains repeated bus_layout_proposal events for PulpHostBench VST3.

No process_is_playing_edge in this headless scripted smoke; REAPER ran without an active playback device, so no real transport-playing edge was produced. The 2026-06-12 manual run confirmed this flag.
Keyboard routing is not exercised by the scripted smoke.
No process_buffer_overrun or process_sample_rate_drift event was observed in this run.
No deserialize_plugin_state event was observed (the smoke does not reopen a saved session).
